notes: Madrid SME consulting baseline. Uplift = 0 (canonical reference for SOP-ENG_ESTIMATION_DISCIPLINE_001 §4 hourly rates). 14 public-holiday-equivalent days/year averages national + regional holidays (e.g. Madrid).
